mapper.select:
WITH latest_sensor AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.equipment_id) s.equipment_id, s.temperature, s.vibration, s.risk_score, s.recorded_at FROM sensor_log s ORDER BY s.equipment_id, s.recorded_at DESC ), signal_equipment AS ( SELECT ls.temperature, ls.vibration, ls.risk_score, ls.recorded_at FROM latest_sensor ls JOIN equipment e ON ls.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE e.equipment_type IN ('PTZ_MOTOR', 'SIGNAL_CONTROLLER') ORDER BY ls.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1 ), camera_equipment AS ( SELECT ls.temperature, ls.vibration, ls.risk_score, ls.recorded_at FROM latest_sensor ls JOIN equipment e ON ls.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE e.equipment_type = 'CAMERA' ORDER BY ls.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1 ), latest_maintenance AS ( SELECT m.created_at FROM maintenance_log m ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT temperature FROM signal_equipment), 0) AS temperature, COALESCE((SELECT vibration FROM signal_equipment), 0) AS vibration, COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM signal_equipment), 0) AS risk_score,
GREATEST( 0, LEAST( 100, 100 - CAST(COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM signal_equipment), 0) * 100 AS INTEGER) ) ) AS signal_percent,
CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM signal_equipment), 0) < 0.30 THEN '양호' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM signal_equipment), 0) < 0.60 THEN '주의' ELSE '위험' END AS signal_state,
GREATEST( 0, LEAST( 100, 100 - CAST(COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) * 100 AS INTEGER) ) ) AS camera_percent,
CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) < 0.30 THEN '양호' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) < 0.60 THEN '주의' ELSE '위험' END AS camera_state,
CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) < 0.60 THEN '양호' ELSE '점검필요' END AS operation_status,
CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) < 0.30 THEN '낮음' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT risk_score FROM camera_equipment), 0) < 0.60 THEN '중간' ELSE '높음' END AS failure_risk,
CASE WHEN (SELECT created_at FROM latest_maintenance) IS NULL THEN '정보 없음' ELSE CAST( CAST( DATE_PART('day', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (SELECT created_at FROM latest_maintenance)) AS INTEGER ) AS TEXT ) || '일 전' END AS last_maintenance_text
